name: In Utah, how long to report back injury from job?
description: 180 days notice in UT; prove no prejudice if late[5].

mainEntity.name: In Utah, how long to report back injury from job?

acceptedAnswer.text: 180 days notice in UT; prove no prejudice if late[5].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Provide notice within 180 days; file claim promptly to avoid bars.** Late ok if no prejudice and discovery of work link[5]. **Key factors:** Knowledge of cause, employer harm from delay. **Practical guidance:** Written notice best, see doctor for records. Appeals can extend[5]. Consult local attorney. **Utah Code §34A-2-407[5].**
